old_value: {"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-nl2","title":"Migrate TTS engine from Coqui TTS to Kokoro-FastAPI","description":"Replace Coqui TTS (tts_models/es/mai/tacotron2-DDC) with Kokoro-FastAPI (github.com/remsky/Kokoro-FastAPI) as the TTS engine. Kokoro-FastAPI provides a Dockerized OpenAI-compatible speech API with GPU acceleration (CUDA 12.8, 35-100x realtime). CAVEAT: Kokoro currently supports English, Japanese, Chinese only — Spanish support is NOT yet available. This issue is blocked until Kokoro adds Spanish, or we use it for English TTS and keep a separate Spanish engine. Steps: (1) Add Kokoro-FastAPI as a Docker service in compose, (2) Replace tts_es.py TTS calls with OpenAI-compatible API calls to Kokoro endpoint, (3) Keep audio sync logic (_synced_segment_audio) intact, (4) Update pyproject.toml — remove Coqui TTS dep, add openai client.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-13T15:19:33Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-13T15:19:33Z"}

new_value: Kokoro does not support Spanish. Replacing with Coqui XTTS-v2.

old_value: {"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-c42","title":"Migrate M6 backend from Django to FastAPI","description":"The current M6 extra credit implementation uses Django (whispers/ app) to serve the translation pipeline. Django is heavyweight for this use case: it brings ORM, admin, sessions, and auth middleware that are unused. FastAPI is a better fit — async-native (important since Whisper, TTS, and video processing are all long-running), automatic OpenAPI docs, and lighter to containerise for the Docker Compose requirement. This epic covers replacing the whispers/ Django app with a FastAPI backend while keeping app.py (Streamlit) as the frontend.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:21Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:21Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Superseded by FastAPI migration (c42 epic). Django deployment is no longer needed — iy7 covers Docker Compose for FastAPI instead.

old_value: {"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-r7s","title":"Define FastAPI app skeleton and project layout","description":"Create the FastAPI entry point (main.py) with app instantiation, CORS middleware, and lifespan hooks for loading the Whisper model and TTS model once at startup (rather than per-request as the current Django views do). Establish the directory layout: routers/, services/, schemas/ — mirroring the existing Django apps but without ORM machinery. Add fastapi, uvicorn[standard], and python-multipart to requirements.txt.","acceptance_criteria":"uvicorn main:app --reload starts without errors. GET /healthz returns 200. OpenAPI docs are available at /docs. Whisper and TTS models are loaded once in the lifespan context.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:28Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:28Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-by5","title":"Port video download and caption endpoint to FastAPI","description":"Replicate the functionality of whispers/vid2vid/views.py download logic as a FastAPI router. Expose POST /api/download accepting a YouTube URL and returning video_id plus the downloaded transcript as JSON. Use the existing download_video.py and download_video_captions.py modules as the service layer — do not duplicate their logic. Add the re-download guard from beads issue foreign-whispers-projects-fo6 as part of this work.","acceptance_criteria":"POST /api/download with a valid YouTube URL returns {video_id, transcript_segments[]}. Calling it twice for the same URL skips re-download. Invalid URLs return 422.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:34Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:34Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-58f","title":"Port transcription endpoint to FastAPI","description":"Expose POST /api/transcribe accepting a video_id. Run Whisper transcription via transcribe.py service layer using the model loaded at startup (not re-loaded per request). Return structured segments JSON. Since transcription is long-running, the endpoint should either run in a thread pool (run_in_executor) or return a job_id immediately and expose GET /api/transcribe/{job_id}/status for polling.","acceptance_criteria":"POST /api/transcribe/{video_id} triggers transcription without blocking the event loop. The response (or polled status) contains segments with start/end/text. The Whisper model is not reloaded between calls.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:40Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:40Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Implemented POST /api/download endpoint in routers/download.py. Validates YouTube URLs (422 for invalid), skips re-download for cached files (issue fo6 guard), reads caption segments from line-delimited JSON. 3 tests in test_download_router.py.

Implemented POST /api/transcribe/{video_id} endpoint in routers/transcribe.py. Uses Whisper model from app.state (loaded at startup, not per-request). Persists transcription to JSON. Skips re-transcription for cached results. Returns 404 for missing videos. 4 tests in test_transcribe_router.py.

old_value: {"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-c0m","title":"Port translation endpoint to FastAPI","description":"Expose POST /api/translate accepting video_id and target_language. Use translate_en_to_es.py as the service layer. Fix the scope bug from beads issue foreign-whispers-projects-5ss (translate only the specified video, not the entire directory) as part of this work. Return translated segments JSON.","acceptance_criteria":"POST /api/translate/{video_id} translates only that video's transcript. Previously translated videos are not reprocessed. Response contains translated segments with timestamps preserved.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:45Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:45Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-381","title":"Port TTS + audio-sync endpoint to FastAPI","description":"Expose POST /api/tts accepting video_id and target_language. Use tts_es.py as the service layer but with the timestamp synchronisation fix from beads issue foreign-whispers-projects-ccu applied: per-segment audio generation with pyrubberband time-stretching and silence padding. Return the path to the generated WAV. TTS model should be loaded at startup, not per-request.","acceptance_criteria":"POST /api/tts/{video_id} produces a WAV where each segment's duration matches the source timestamp window. The TTS model is not reloaded between calls. The endpoint runs in a thread pool to avoid blocking.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:50Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:14:50Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Implemented POST /api/translate/{video_id} in routers/translate.py. Translates a single video transcript (fixes 5ss scope bug — no directory sweep). Caches results, returns 404 for missing sources. 4 tests.

Implemented POST /api/tts/{video_id} in routers/tts.py. Uses TTS model from app.state (loaded once at startup). Runs in thread pool to avoid blocking. Caches WAV output. Added tts_engine parameter to text_file_to_speech() so FastAPI can inject its model. 4 tests.

old_value: {"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-ttl","title":"Add ImageMagick as explicit dependency and document install","description":"stitch_video_with_timestamps() in translated_output.py uses moviepy TextClip objects, which require ImageMagick to be installed system-wide. ImageMagick is not listed in requirements.txt and is not mentioned anywhere in the README or documentation. The app fails at runtime with a cryptic moviepy error when ImageMagick is absent. Additionally, moviepy must be configured with the correct ImageMagick binary path via IMAGEMAGICK_BINARY.","acceptance_criteria":"requirements.txt or a setup script installs or validates ImageMagick. README documents the system dependency with the install command for common platforms. moviepy IMAGEMAGICK_BINARY is set correctly at startup.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:10Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:10Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"foreign-whispers-projects-6e1","title":"Hardcoded file paths break portability","description":"Multiple files assume a fixed directory layout relative to the script working directory: stitch_video_with_timestamps() in translated_output.py constructs paths like './ui/raw_video/', './ui/translated_audio/', etc. The video_cached() check in the Django app (whispers/vid2vid/views.py) uses a hardcoded BASE_PATH. app.py also uses inline string literals for all intermediate directories. Moving any file or running from a different working directory causes silent failures or FileNotFoundErrors.","acceptance_criteria":"All file paths are derived from a single configurable base directory (e.g., a constant at the top of app.py or an env variable). No path literals are duplicated across files.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:29Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-02-24T00:13:39Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value: Auto-detect ImageMagick binary via PATH/env var instead of hardcoded macOS path. Added imagemagick to Dockerfile apt-get. 3 tests in test_imagemagick.py.
Removed all hardcoded path literals from translated_output.py. stitch_audio() now takes explicit path params. __main__ block uses sys.argv. 2 tests in test_path_portability.py.

Show the Streamlit UI and FastAPI backend as separate entry points.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-13T15:30:19Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:38:14Z"}

{"id":"fw-4f0","title":"OAuth credentials file missing from submission","description":"download_video_captions.py requires a credentials_desktop_app.json file for Google OAuth authentication against the YouTube Data API. This file is not included in the repository (correctly, as it contains secrets), but there is no .env.example, no documentation of what the file must contain, and no fallback to the simpler youtube-transcript-api flow when the credentials file is absent. Anyone attempting to run the script gets an immediate FileNotFoundError.","acceptance_criteria":"The credentials file requirement is documented in the README with instructions for obtaining it. A .gitignore entry exists for the file. The script degrades gracefully (falls back to youtube-transcript-api) when the credentials file is not present.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:16Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:38:14Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"fw-5ss","title":"translate_all_files() reprocesses entire directory on every run","description":"translate_all_files() in translate_en_to_es.py iterates over every JSON file in the transcriptions_en/ directory and overwrites the corresponding file in transcriptions_es/. When the Streamlit app processes a new video, this function retranslates all previously processed videos unnecessarily. For 10 videos this adds significant latency and wastes argostranslate inference. The function should accept a specific file path or video ID to scope its work.","acceptance_criteria":"translate_all_files() (or its caller in app.py) only translates the specific video being processed. Previously translated files are not reprocessed.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:23Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:38:14Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"fw-fo6","title":"download_video.py re-downloads videos on every run","description":"download_video() in download_video.py does not check whether a video file already exists before calling pytube to download it. Running the script twice will re-download all 10 videos, overwriting existing files. This is slow and unnecessary. The youtube-transcript-api caption download has the same issue.","acceptance_criteria":"Before downloading, the script checks whether the target MP4 and caption JSON files already exist. Existing files are skipped with a log message.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:44Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:38:14Z","work_type":"mutex"}

new_value:
{"description":"Restructure the foreign-whispers repo from its current hybrid state (legacy root-level utility modules + partially-built FastAPI routers) into a clean, production-grade FastAPI application following the layered architecture pattern demonstrated by Kokoro-FastAPI.

**Reference:** https://github.com/remsky/Kokoro-FastAPI

**Target architecture:**
```
foreign-whispers/
├── api/
│   └── src/
│       ├── main.py              # FastAPI app + lifespan
│       ├── core/
│       │   ├── config.py        # Pydantic BaseSettings
│       │   └── dependencies.py  # Shared DI providers
│       ├── routers/
│       │   ├── pipeline.py      # Full pipeline orchestration
│       │   ├── download.py
│       │   ├── transcribe.py
│       │   ├── translate.py
│       │   ├── tts.py
│       │   └── stitch.py
│       ├── services/            # Business logic (no HTTP concerns)
│       │   ├── download_service.py
│       │   ├── transcription_service.py
│       │   ├── translation_service.py
│       │   ├── tts_service.py
│       │   ├── stitch_service.py
│       │   └── storage_service.py  # S3 abstraction
│       ├── inference/           # ML model backends
│       │   ├── whisper_backend.py
│       │   └── tts_backend.py
│       └── schemas/             # Pydantic request/response models
│           ├── download.py
│           ├── transcription.py
│           ├── translation.py
│           ├── tts.py
│           └── pipeline.py
├── docker/
│   ├── cpu/
│   └── gpu/
├── tests/
├── speakers/
└── pyproject.toml
```

**External integrations (auraison platform):**
- **Model serving:** Whisper + TTS served via vLLM / Ray Serve on KubeRay (torch.dev.gpu environment), not loaded in-process
- **Object storage:** S3 via s3.aegean.ai (MinIO on TrueNAS, Cloudflare tunnel) — all intermediate/output artifacts stored in S3 instead of local ./ui/ filesystem
- **Database:** PostgreSQL for job tracking, video metadata, and processing state (replaces filesystem-based caching)
- **Control plane:** Submit GPU-heavy work as Ray Jobs via auraison control plane API (POST /api/v1/jobs)

**Key principles:**
1. Routers are thin — validate input, call service, return response
2. Services contain all business logic, are HTTP-agnostic and testable
3. Inference layer wraps ML model calls (local or remote via vLLM/Ray Serve)
4. Schemas define all request/response contracts
5. Configuration via Pydantic BaseSettings + .env
6. Dependency injection via FastAPI Depends()
7. No legacy code at repo root — everything under api/src/"}
old_value: {"id":"fw-b54","title":"FastAPI restructure: Kokoro-style layered architecture with auraison integration","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T10:53:25Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:53:25Z"}

{"id":"fw-b54.4","title":"Scaffold api/src/ package structure with main.py and core/config.py","description":"Create the api/src/ package layout: main.py (FastAPI app with lifespan), core/config.py (Pydantic BaseSettings with S3, PostgreSQL, vLLM endpoints, CORS, model config), core/dependencies.py (Depends providers for services and DB session). Move existing main.py and core/ content. Settings should read from .env with sensible defaults for local dev. Reference: Kokoro-FastAPI core/config.py pattern.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T10:55:26Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:55:26Z"}

new_value: Scaffolded api/src/ package with main.py, core/config.py, core/dependencies.py, routers, schemas, services. All 59 tests pass.

old_value: {"id":"fw-b54.1","title":"Delete superceded/ directory and legacy demo videos","description":"Remove all legacy code: superceded/project-1/ (Django), superceded/project-3/ (M1-only), milestone6_demo.webm, project_demo.mov, output_logs/, download_video_captions.py (Google OAuth variant replaced by fallback), requirements.txt (replaced by pyproject.toml). Update .gitignore and README.md references. No blockers — do this first.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T10:54:29Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:54:29Z"}

{"id":"fw-b54.3","title":"Create Pydantic schemas for all API contracts","description":"Define request/response models in api/src/schemas/: DownloadRequest (url, language), TranscriptionResult (segments with start/end/text), TranslationResult, TTSResult, PipelineRequest (full end-to-end), PipelineStatus. Use Pydantic v2 model_validator where needed. These replace the implicit dict/JSON structures currently passed between modules.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T10:55:26Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:55:26Z"}

{"id":"fw-b54.6","title":"Create inference layer for Whisper and TTS backends","description":"Create api/src/inference/ with WhisperBackend and TTSBackend classes. Each backend has a local mode (load model in-process, current behavior) and a remote mode (call vLLM/Ray Serve endpoint on auraison KubeRay cluster). Backend selection via config (settings.whisper_backend = \"local\" | \"remote\"). Remote mode sends gRPC/HTTP requests to model serving endpoints. This decouples the app from heavy GPU dependencies.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T12:34:33Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T12:34:33Z"}

{"id":"fw-b54.7","title":"Add S3 storage service replacing local filesystem cache","description":"Create api/src/services/storage_service.py wrapping S3 operations via boto3/aioboto3. All pipeline artifacts (raw videos, transcriptions, translations, audio, final video) stored in s3.aegean.ai buckets instead of local ./ui/ directories. Bucket layout: s3://foreign-whispers/{video_id}/raw.mp4, transcription_en.json, transcription_es.json, audio_es.wav, output.mp4. StorageService injected into other services via Depends(). Local filesystem fallback for dev without S3.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T12:34:33Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T12:34:33Z"}

The Streamlit app.py is also removed (replaced by FastAPI).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T10:55:26Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:55:26Z"}

{"id":"fw-b54.8","title":"Add PostgreSQL for job tracking and video metadata","description":"Replace filesystem-based caching (video_cached() in app.py) with PostgreSQL. Tables: videos (id, url, title, status, language, s3_prefix, created_at), pipeline_jobs (id, video_id, stage, status, started_at, completed_at, error). Use SQLAlchemy async with asyncpg. Connection via settings.database_url. Alembic for migrations. DB session injected via Depends(get_db). This enables proper job tracking and multi-worker processing.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T12:34:34Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T12:34:34Z"}

{"id":"fw-jhg","title":"Deploy Streamlit app to Hugging Face Spaces","description":"M5a of the spec explicitly requires the Streamlit UI to be deployed on Hugging Face Spaces (Streamlit Spaces). app.py is a complete Streamlit implementation but it only runs locally. No HF Space exists. This is a graded milestone requirement worth 15 of the 20 M5a points.","acceptance_criteria":"A public Hugging Face Space exists running app.py. The Space URL is recorded in the project README. A user can paste a YouTube URL and receive a translated video without running anything locally.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:03Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:38:14Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"fw-901","title":"Add pitch video YouTube link to README","description":"M5a awards 5 points for a 30-second pitch video uploaded to YouTube with a link in the submission. milestone6_demo.webm exists locally in the project directory but there is no YouTube upload and no link in the README. The 5 points are at risk.","acceptance_criteria":"A YouTube link to the pitch video is present in the README under a clearly labelled section.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-02-24T00:07:40Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T10:38:14Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"notes":"Cancelled: architectural pivot — foreign-whispers is standalone, auraison onboards external apps from its side","status":"closed"}
old_value: {"id":"fw-b54.11","title":"Add auraison control plane integration for GPU job submission","description":"Add api/src/services/job_service.py that submits heavy GPU work (transcription, TTS) to auraison control plane via POST /api/v1/jobs. Foreign-whispers acts as a user-plane app: submits job with video_id + parameters, receives callback webhook when complete, retrieves artifacts from S3. This offloads GPU work to KubeRay torch.dev.gpu workers. Optional — only used when settings.use_remote_inference = true.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"pantelis.monogioudis@aegean.ai","created_at":"2026-03-15T12:35:57Z","created_by":"Pantelis Monogioudis","updated_at":"2026-03-15T12:35:57Z"}
